formula: ZMWUS1 = max(TYPE_B_ARR, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(FEA3 * ZMER1 * ABPH1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Cytokinin = max(ZMIPT, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(ZMCKX * UB3, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
BA1 = (max(ARF6, 0.01) * max(BIF2, 0.01) * max(FEA4, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(BIF1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
RA1 = (max(RA2, 0.01) * max(RA3, 0.01) * max(FEA4, 0.01) * max(IDS1, 0.01))^(1/4) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
IM_Size = (max(ZMWUS1, 0.01) * max(KN1, 0.01) * max(AGAP, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(TD1 * CT2 * ZMCRN * FEA4 * UB3 * REL2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Axillary_Meristem = (max(ZMPIN1A, 0.01) * max(BA1, 0.01) * max(BA2, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(RA1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Ear_Branching = (max(T6P, 0.01))^(1/1) * min(1/max(RA1 * IDS1 * SID1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Kernel_Row_Number = (max(ZMTCP30, 0.01) * max(KRN5B, 0.01) * max(Axillary_Meristem, 0.01) * max(IM_Size, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(TSH4 * KRN2 * Ear_Branching * FEA4, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
